personalInformation.description: Basic personal details of the candidate.

emailAddress.description: Essential for reaching out to candidates.

location.description: City/State, often used to check if the candidate is local or requires relocation.

linkedinOrPortfolioUrl.description: Professional social media or portfolio websites.

companyName.description: Organizations where the candidate was employed.

datesOfEmployment.description: Start and end dates of employment.

quantifiedMetrics.description: Percentages, dollar amounts, or numbers showing impact.

universityName.description: Institution where the degree was obtained.

graduationYear.description: Year of graduation, often used to gauge seniority.

relevantCourseworkOrProjects.description: Details for recent graduates or specialized roles.

skills.description: Technical and soft skills of the candidate.

hardSkills.description: Specific software, tools, languages, or specialized machinery (e.g., Python, AWS, Agile).

softSkills.description: Interpersonal and professional skills (e.g., Leadership, Communication).

certifications.description: Valid credentials required for specialized roles (e.g., CPA, PMP, RN).

otherAttributes.description: Additional important attributes of the candidate.

languagesKnown.description: Language proficiency levels, essential for global roles.
